name: KEWAUNEE SCIENTIFIC CORP /DE/
summary: Kewaunee Scientific Corporation designs, manufactures, and installs laboratory, healthcare, and technical furniture and infrastructure products. Products include steel and wood casework, fume hoods, adaptable modular systems, moveable workstations, biological safety cabinets, and epoxy resin work surfaces. Following its November 2024 acquisition of Nu Aire, the company also offers biological safety cabinets, CO2 incubators, ultralow freezers, and animal handling equipment. Products are sold to pharmaceutical, biotechnology, industrial, chemical, educational, healthcare, and governmental customers domestically and internationally.
